title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・最初の証

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... That was one long race... Real long...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sure, 3,200 meters is a helluva distance, Kyoto
or otherwise... But includin' the journey to get
here? I feel like I've been runnin' for ages.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But I did it... I finally did it! I finished the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Didja see dat, Dad?! Your girl left her mark on
this turf!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spectators echo Tamamo Cross's enthusiasm.
Meanwhile, a certain Umamusume watches in
awe.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: This is... incredible...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Not even top fashion brands draw this much
excitement at their shows. But this...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So this is what the senior G1 races of the Twinkle
Series are like... No, that's not right...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: This is all Tamamo's doing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross has triggered a groundswell of
support the likes of which nobody has ever seen
before—and it's only growing stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Phew, things are finally calmin' down. Trainer, I
did pretty well for myself, dont'cha think?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I know, right? White Lightning sure lit up
that big ol' stage. And I couldn't have done it
without you!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But we're just gettin' started. I can't say my
dream's come true till I've dominated the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So it's time to do this! Mom, Dad, the li'l squirts...
We can't let any of 'em cry another tear!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Takarazuka Kinen! I'll make a name
for myself this spring, 'n then it'll be time to
tackle the big one in the fall!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hm, what the? Who could that be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross's phone begins to vibrate, so she
answers the call.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That you, Mom? What's wrong? We just talked
yesterday, 'n it's kinda late for a chat.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You findin' work okay? Did somethin' happen?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No... That can't be right... Just yesterday, he was
so full of life...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: This... can't be real...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stares ahead. Shocked to the core, Tamamo
Cross is frozen in place.
